global_discoveries.project: DAAAM (Describe Anything, Anywhere, Anytime, at Any Moment)
global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: MIT's long-term memory framework for robots combines computer vision and 3D mapping to attach language descriptions to objects in spatial maps, enabling accurate recall of object locations and details over time for real-world queries.
Unreal 5.8 transforms game engines into AI agent workspaces, enabling advanced agent orchestration and simulation capabilities.
